title: taraxacum oxycentrum
intro: Taraxacum oxycentrum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its smaller size and more delicate appearance compared to the common dandelion. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum oxycentrum include its anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum oxycentrum include supporting liver and kidney function, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating digestive issues. Taraxacum oxycentrum can be prepared for herbal use through tea infusions, tinctures, or dried root powder, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
